name: Everlight_Logistics_FullStack_Workflows

slack_channels.linked_workflows: n8n integrations for main company feed & ai alerts

n8n integrations for logs wallet changes, transactions
n8n integrations for posts gpt-generated to-do lists + habits
n8n integrations for logs gmail, customer support & autoresponders

n8n integrations for on-demand assistant + gpt-4.5 tools

n8n integrations for logs personal memos, mobile notes

n8n integrations for breaks down deliverables + agent assignments
